user.title: Hydro-Québec Outages — Add Location
user.description:
Configure a location to monitor for Hydro-Québec outages and planned interruptions. The integration will check for events within the specified radius. Data is refreshed every 15 minutes.

Data source: {docs_url}

data_description.name: A friendly name for this monitored location (e.g. Home, Chalet, Office)
data_description.latitude: Latitude of the location to monitor
data_description.longitude: Longitude of the location to monitor
data_description.radius_km: Radius in kilometres to search for outages around this location

error.invalid_coordinates: Invalid coordinates — please enter valid numeric values.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Hydro-Québec API. Please try again later.

error.invalid_coordinates: Invalid coordinates — please enter valid numeric values.
